metadata.description: Personal AI Assistant Skill for idea recording and tracking with intelligent analysis based on project context

plugins.name: idea-recorder
plugins.description: 记录用户的想法并基于项目认知提供分析和建议。当用户说"记录我的想法"、"有个想法"、"记录想法"或类似语句时触发。自动将想法保存为独立的 Markdown 文件,包含用户原句、基于项目认知的分析、疑问点和改进建议。

plugins.name: skill-registrar
plugins.description: Automatically register new skills in the my-skills project. Detects new skill directories in .claude/skills/, extracts metadata from SKILL.md, updates marketplace.json with complete plugin configuration, and performs git operations (add, commit, push). Triggered by keywords: "注册技能", "添加技能", "注册新技能", "skill register", "register skill". Use when user adds a new skill to the project and wants to register it in marketplace.json and push to GitHub.
